rationale: The cited paper is a close conceptual/methodological predecessor: it integrates dynamic advertising–sales response with brand-building intermediates in a Bayesian state-space framework, while the citing paper also builds a joint dynamic advertising–sales model to explain ad effectiveness via in-ad brand cues. Given this strong overlap in core constructs (advertising effectiveness, brand building, dynamics) and exact DOI match, this is plausibly a foundational/theory-method source rather than an incidental mention.
